description.p: Stremio Lightning is a fast, lightweight, and modern desktop wrapper for Stremio. It features community plugin management, downloadable themes, Discord Rich Presence, and a native media player powered by libmpv.

screenshot.caption: Apply custom themes in Stremio Lightning

description.p: This release includes the following playback and diagnostics updates:

ul.li: Restored Windows playback with the current Stremio shell protocol

description.p: This release includes the following packaging updates:

ul.li: Updated the Flatpak application identity for Flathub
Reduced the Flatpak size by using runtime-provided Node.js and media tools

description.p: This release includes the following updates:

ul.li: Added plugin, theme, and settings integration on Windows
Reduced IPC overhead when checking mod updates and loading settings
Improved picture-in-picture behavior and window dragging on Linux

description.p: This release features performance improvements and packaging refinements:

ul.li: Reduced Linux memory and CPU usage
Refined Linux packaging code and documentation

description.p: This release introduces Flatpak GNOME 50 runtime upgrades and performance enhancements:

ul.li: Upgraded Flatpak packaging to the GNOME 50 runtime
Improved startup performance with concurrent plugin loading and registry caching
Improved release automation and packaging reliability
